summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ILWU Local 4 Golf Tournament registration system. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend working with minor dropdown UX issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown selection requires keyboard navigation instead of direct click on options
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can use keyboard Enter key to select first option or arrow keys to navigate

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints (16/16 tests passed)
Individual player registration with team assignment
Team number randomization and uniqueness (1-18 range)
Admin team and player management views
Confirmation page display with team numbers
